rationale: For Raspberry Pi 4/5 deployment, ONNX with ONNX Runtime is recommended: smaller than PyTorch runtime, faster than TFLite for YOLO on ARM with NEON, and supports FP16 quantization. TFLite INT8 is alternative for Pi 4 with limited RAM. PyTorch (.pt) best for development and Colab only.
pi4_notes: Pi 4 (4GB): Use ONNX FP16 or TFLite INT8, imgsz=416, expect 8-15 FPS. Pi 5 (8GB): Use ONNX FP32, imgsz=640, expect 15-25 FPS with YOLOv11n.
